title: Modern Hypixel SkyBlock
description: Everything you need to play Hypixel SkyBlock on new Minecraft versions
body:
![A screenshot of the Hypixel SkyBlock hub, at the top of the image is the text "Modern Hypixel SkyBlock"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d193f2f00e5e1639e7295bcf23e6bec2e524b428.jpeg) ## About

Hypixel SkyBlock is now taking advantage of features from newer Minecraft versions!

I've compiled a modlist that contains all you need to play SkyBlock on these newer versions. This pack includes:

Visual Mods: Enhancements to make the SkyBlock world look better.

Optimization Mods: Improvements to help the game run smoother.

SkyBlock Specific Utilities: Helpful tools designed for the SkyBlock experience on modern versions.

## Technical Help - My ResourcePack wont apply! - Add the following to your Java arguments: ``` -Xss4M ``` - I'm getting stuttering! - Allocate more RAM (4GB should be more then enough), or try switching to the Z Garbage Collector by adding the following to your Java arguments: ``` -XX:+UseZGC -XX:+ZGenerational -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -XX:+UseStringDeduplication ``` - How do I toggle fullbright? - H (you can rebind this!) - Is there a zoom? - Yes! It defualts to C which can conflict with a vanilla MC keybind so you may need to change it. - How do I toggle autosprint? - hit ESC go to Mods -> Firmament -> Miscellaneous -> Fixes and the toggle will be there. You can also set up a toggle keybind here! - How do I enabled Voxy? - Esc -> Options -> Video Settings -> Voxy -> General -> Enable Voxy
